description: Evaluates network management service maturity—service governance, KPIs/KRIs, network management processes, NMS platform capabilities, zero-trust segmentation alignment, capacity planning and scale, visibility and fault correlation, device user management, and network monitoring.

capabilities.name: Service exists and is in good condition
capabilities.description: A network management service exists, is scoped appropriately, and is reviewed at least quarterly for efficacy.
evaluation_focus: Enterprise network management service exists
Regular service efficacy review

capabilities.name: KPIs/KRIs
capabilities.description: Network management KPIs and KRIs—including availability, fault MTTR, and capacity utilization—are documented and reviewed at least quarterly.
evaluation_focus: Documented KPIs and KRIs for network management
Regular KPI/KRI review
Network availability and fault recovery metrics
Capacity utilization and scaling effectiveness metrics

capabilities.name: Network management process
capabilities.description: An enterprise-wide formalized network management process is documented, automated where appropriate, aligned to zero-trust segmentation, and reviewed at least quarterly.
evaluation_focus: Enterprise-wide formalized documented network management process
Network management process automation
Zero-trust segmentation alignment in network operations
Regular network management process review

capabilities.name: NMS Platform
capabilities.description: An NMS platform manages network devices enterprise-wide, supports automation, is reviewed at least quarterly, and integrates with configuration, asset, and policy management systems.
evaluation_focus: NMS platform exists
Enterprise-wide network device management
NMS automation features such as upgrades and remediation
Regular NMS platform configuration review
Integration with configuration, asset, and policy management systems

capabilities.name: Capacity planning and scale
capabilities.description: Capacity planning monitors availability and performance enterprise-wide; the network supports automatic or programmatic scaling with configuration reviewed at least quarterly.
evaluation_focus: Formalized documented capacity planning process
Network expansion based on workload increase
Enterprise-wide scaling capability
Automatic or programmatic capacity expansion
Regular capacity and scaling configuration review

capabilities.name: Network visibility and fault correlation
capabilities.description: The NMS provides full enterprise-wide network visibility with fault detection, correlation, and segmentation context.
evaluation_focus: Full enterprise-wide network visibility in NMS
Full fault visibility and correlation across the network
Segmentation and trust-zone visibility in NMS

capabilities.name: Network device user management
capabilities.description: The NMS can create and manage users who access the platform and view dashboards with role-appropriate scope.
evaluation_focus: NMS user creation and management for dashboard access

capabilities.name: Network monitoring
capabilities.description: The NMS deploys monitoring mechanisms such as SNMP and Syslog and monitors all network devices enterprise-wide.
evaluation_focus: SNMP, Syslog, and similar monitoring mechanisms
Enterprise-wide network device monitoring

evaluation.resiliency_weight_policy: Ask stakeholder for per-capability weights when adding a new evaluation service. This service uses weight 1 for all capabilities.
evaluation.pillar_policy: Some services may have no Technology capabilities; in those cases, do not compute or report a Technology pillar score.
